verdict_reasoning: EREG is a single-pass transmembrane protein with a transmembrane domain anchoring it to the plasma membrane and a substantial extracellular EGF-like ectodomain. The membrane-anchored precursor form is surface-resident and capable of juxtacrine signaling before regulated ADAM17-mediated ectodomain shedding releases the soluble mature form. The protein accesses the outer leaflet via its own TM mechanism.
